provenance.note: SELF-GENERATED regression fixture (NOT an external oracle): produced by hartree itself to pin the B3LYP-3c composite against drift, on the production point-efficient pruned level-3 grid. Geometries from tests/ref/geometries.json (bohr).

engines.scf: hartree RKS b3lyp5 (xcx hyb_gga_xc_b3lyp5, libxc 475 convention), def2-mSVP, grid 3
engines.d3: hartree D3(BJ)-ATM, b3lyp-3c parameters (s6=1, s8=1.9889, a1=0.3981, a2=4.4211, s9=1; ATM zero damping alp=16, rs9=4/3 over D3 cutoff radii, simple-dftd3 convention)
engines.gcp: hartree gCP, DFT/SV(P) parameter set (sigma=0.2424, eta=1.2371, alpha=0.6076, beta=1.4078, undamped; validated against the mctc-gcp test-suite reference in hartree-disp/tests/composite3c_terms.rs)

provenance.method: B3LYP-3c: B3LYP(VWN5)/def2-mSVP + D3(BJ)-ATM + gCP(DFT/SV(P)); Pracht, Grant, Grimme, J. Chem. Theory Comput. 16, 7044 (2020); bundling as in ORCA's B3LYP-3c keyword
